span.p:
Inputs
RSS, official blogs, GitHub signals,
watchlist, DDG, HN, Reddit, Telegram channels,
Facebook/social signals, Telegram feedback

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Orchestration
pipeline_runner.py:
initial state, runtime preset, source health,
process lock, model override

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Processing
gather -> normalize -> deduplicate -> collect_feedback
-> early_rule_filter -> batch_classify_and_score
-> batch_deep_process / batch_quick_compose
-> merge_processed_articles -> delivery_judge
-> save_notion -> summarize_vn -> quality_gate

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Review + delivery
UI preview, quality-first Telegram main brief,
run health, publish_ready

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Storage + artefacts
SQLite, vector memory, Notion,
reports, temporal snapshots, .runtime_archive/
